name: Sora 12x30 Tiny Home Plan - Modern Compact Living with Timeless Style
open_features: Minimalist, modern architecture designed for small lots, tight property lines, and flexible backyard living.
Straightforward framing, clear instructions, and clean lines make Sora approachable for both beginners and seasoned builders.
Strategically placed doors and windows ensure easy access, natural light, and ventilation throughout the interior.
Horizontal wood siding, clean trim, and a single-pitch roof create a modern yet rustic balance that suits any backyard or garden setting.
description_summary: Kickstart your backyard transformation with the Sora Tiny Home - a spacious 12x30 modern tiny house designed for efficiency, style, and versatile living. Featuring a sleek single-slope roof, warm horizontal wood siding, and thoughtfully placed doors and windows, Sora blends contemporary design with everyday practicality. Whether you're creating a backyard office, guest retreat, creative studio, or full tiny-home living space, the 12x30 Sora offers smart space planning, DIY-friendly constructi...
